assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 7 of claude-md-result.md contains: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matching the original values exactly (Role: Rust backend service, Serena Instance: serena_backend, Path: /home/user/trustify-backend).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: Line 8 of claude-md-result.md contains: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — a new row with trustify-ui repository and serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 12-16 of claude-md-result.md show: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747 — all matching the original values exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has two clearly labeled sections: '## Preserved (existing entries, unchanged)' (lines 3-18) listing the trustify-backend registry entry, all Jira fields, and Code Intelligence content; and '## Added (new entries)' (lines 20-26) listing the trustify-ui registry entry and serena_ui limitation.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 9-10 of discovery-log.md state: '1. **serena_backend** -- Already configured in Repository Registry. No action needed.' and '2. **serena_ui** -- Newly discovered. Not present in existing Repository Registry. Needs to be added.'

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 20-33 of claude-md-result.md preserve the naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.'), the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol call), and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). The only addition is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.
